subject: Human Resources
title: Freelancing as a Career
description: A fast breakdown of Freelancing as a Career for builders.

hook.text: A marketing executive quits to freelance. She earns more, works less, and chooses her projects.

buildup.text: Freelancing evolved from fallback to deliberate career choice—offering autonomy, variety, and income traditional jobs can't.

discovery.text: Platforms like Upwork, Toptal, and Fiverr created global marketplaces—a designer in Lagos competes with one in London.

climax.text: Smart freelancers build personal brands, recurring client relationships, and diverse income streams—making gig work sustainable.

punchline.text: Freelancing isn't a fallback anymore. For many, it's the upgrade.

quiz.question: What is the biggest challenge of freelancing?
options: Income volatility and the feast-or-famine cycle
